_description: Extraction template for Form 1120-S (S-Corporation). Read this before processing any 1120-S tax return. Extract every field listed below, marking N/A if not present. Cross-check validation rules after extraction.
_usage: The orchestrator reads this template, then systematically reads each page image and extracts the listed fields. After extraction, run the validation cross-checks.

fields.tax_year: Calendar year or fiscal year dates
fields.line_17_pensions_profit_sharing: SDE-RELEVANT: add back if owner benefit
fields.line_21_ordinary_business_income: SDE-CRITICAL: this is the starting point for SDE reconstruction

validation: Cross-check line_1a against CIM revenue for same year (>5% = flag)
Cross-check line_7 against CIM officer comp (>5% = flag)
Cross-check line_21 against CIM net income (>5% = flag)

schedule_k.description: Shareholders' Pro Rata Share Items - page 3-4

fields.line_18_income_reconciliation: Should approximate net income per books

validation: line_15 (total assets) should equal line_27 (total L&E)
Current year BOY should match prior year EOY (if both returns available)
Flag if line_3 (inventories) is $0 but CIM claims inventory value
Flag if line_19 (shareholder loans) changed significantly year-over-year

schedule_m1.description: Reconciliation of Income per Books With Income per Return - page 5

fields.line_1_net_income_per_books: May differ from line 21 by non-deductible items

validation: line_8 should equal Schedule K line 18
If line_5 is material, extract the detail — often contains owner benefits classified differently

fields.line_8_balance_eoy: Should match Schedule L line 24 retained earnings

validation: line_8 should approximately equal Schedule L line 24 (retained earnings EOY)
line_7 should match Schedule K line 16d

fields.line_3_cost_of_labor: SDE-RELEVANT: labor classified as COGS vs OpEx varies by preparer
fields.inventory_method: Cost / Lower of cost or market / Other

validation: If line_1 and line_7 are both $0, flag if CIM claims inventory
Compare labor in COGS vs wages on page 1 line 8 — different preparers classify differently

federal_statements.description: Attached statements detailing 'Other Deductions' and other line items

fields.statement_1_other_deductions: Line 19 detail — extract every line item and amount

federal_statements.notes: Statement 1 (Other Deductions) is the most important — it often contains insurance, professional fees, utilities, and other items that may be SDE-relevant.

sde_relevant_fields_summary.description: Quick reference: fields that directly affect SDE reconstruction
check_for_addbacks: statement_1 items: travel, meals, auto, telephone, charitable
schedule_m1 line_5: non-deductible expenses (may include owner disability insurance, etc.)
